zh.Barton, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾巴頓 在 馮 比安斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Notton Lord of Breightmet於大約1175年出生在英國越可爾諾頓時，他的父親Gilbert de Notton - Constable of Chester23歲，母親Juliana de Wigan22歲。他和Cecily Breightmet至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1220年10月16日之前在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾巴頓 在 馮 比安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Notton Lord of Breightmet于大约1175年出生在英国越可爾諾頓时，他的父亲Gilbert de Notton - Constable of Chester23岁，母亲Juliana de Wigan22岁。他和Cecily Breightmet至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1220年10月16日之前在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾巴頓 在 馮 比安斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Notton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Notton in Lacock (Wilts) or Notton in Maiden Newton (Dorset), both of which are recorded as Natton and Netton in the 13th century. The place-names derive from Old English nēat ‘cattle’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Noton .

variants.name: Natton
meanings: English: variant of both   Notton   and   Noton  .

variants.name: Noton
meanings: English: locative name from Notton (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Notone in 1086 and Nocton in 1230. The place-name derives from Old English hnoc ‘wether sheep’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Notton , and perhaps also with Knutton and Nocton .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Notton Lord of Breightmet was born about 1175, in Notton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Notton - Constable of Chester, was 23 and his mother, Juliana de Wigan, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Cecily Breightmet. He died before 16 October 1220, in Barton in the Beans, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Cecily Breightmet. Il est décédé avant 16 octobre 1220, à Barton in the Beans, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Cecily Breightmet mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 16. Oktober 1220 in Barton in the Beans, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Barton, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 바턴 인 테 브이스
ko.lifeSummary: William de Notton Lord of Breightmet(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 요르크실르 노턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Notton - Constable of Chester(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Wigan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Cecily Breightmet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 10월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 바턴 인 테 브이스에서 사망했다.
